verdict: A decent representation of the song's energy, but marred by several awkward 16th-note streams and jump transitions that force uncomfortable double-steps.

issues.problem: Transitioning from a 16th-note LR jump directly into U and D taps at 16th speed (122ms) is extremely rushed and causes physical balance issues.
The 16th-note transition from R to U forces either an extreme left-foot stretch or a right-foot double-step in just 122ms.
The rapid L -> R (16th) -> D -> U (16th) pattern creates highly unintuitive foot placement, requiring bracket tricks or awkward double-stepping.
The sequence of DL jump -> U -> D -> LR jump featuring 16th notes forces a massive double-step from U to D in 122ms, immediately followed by a jump.
A 16th-note stream of D -> L -> U -> D forces an uncomfortable body spin or a rapid double-step on the Down panel.
